title: France vs Sweden summary: score, stats, goals, highlights | World Cup 2026 Round of 32
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
France cruised past Sweden in a one-sided game.

Attempt saved. Mattias Svanberg (Sweden) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Anthony Elanga.

Attempt blocked. Gustaf Nilsson (Sweden) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Benjamin Nygren with a cross.

Taha Ali (Sweden) wins a free kick on the left wing.

Attempt missed. Jean-Philippe Mateta (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Désiré Doué with a cross.

Taha Ali (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

Gustaf Lagerbielke (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Substitution, Sweden. Gustaf Nilsson replaces Alexander Isak.

Attempt saved. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Mike Maignan (France).

Offside, France. Bradley Barcola is caught offside.

Attempt missed. Mattias Svanberg (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left.

Mattias Svanberg (Sweden) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Michael Olise.

Substitution, France. Jean-Philippe Mateta replaces Kylian Mbappé.

Substitution, Sweden. Benjamin Nygren replaces Yasin Ayari.

Substitution, Sweden. Mattias Svanberg replaces Daniel Svensson.

Corner, France. Conceded by Jacob Widell Zetterström.

Attempt saved. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Malo Gusto.

Désiré Doué (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Substitution, France. Désiré Doué replaces Ousmane Dembélé.

Goal! France 3, Sweden 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball.

Attempt saved. Michael Olise (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Jacob Widell Zetterström (Sweden). Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

Attempt blocked. Dayot Upamecano (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

Substitution, Sweden. Besfort Zeneli replaces Lucas Bergvall.

Attempt missed. Lucas Bergvall (Sweden) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Daniel Svensson with a cross following a corner.

Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Lucas Digne.

Anthony Elanga (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Goal! France 2, Sweden 0. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball following a fast break.
